styles.body: font-sans text-base leading-relaxed bg-gradient-to-br from-[#020617] via-[#052E2B] to-[#022C22] text-[#D1FAE5]
styles.h1: text-5xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#34D399] to-[#6EE7B7] text-transparent bg-clip-text mb-10
styles.select: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-md text-[#fff] bg-[#022C22]/80
styles.checkbox: relative w-6 h-6 bg-[#022C22] border-[#10B981] border-2 peer-checked:bg-gradient-to-r from-[#10B981] to-[#34D399]
styles.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#065F46] rounded-lg bg-[#022C22]/80 text-[#D1FAE5] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#34D399] focus:border-[#34D399] backdrop-blur
styles.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#065F46] rounded-lg bg-[#022C22]/80 text-[#D1FAE5] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#34D399] focus:border-[#34D399] backdrop-blur
styles.button: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#10B981] to-[#34D399] text-[#022C22] px-4 py-2 rounded
